arts.ttl: Man City steal march in Champions League race as run-in advantage over rivals clear
arts.sum: Manchester City are in a five-way battle for three Champions League places as the Premier League enters its final weeks

arts.ttl: Ederson, Haaland - Man City injury latest and return dates as five players set to miss FA Cup semi-final
arts.sum: Manchester City take on Nottingham Forest at Wembley in the FA Cup semi-final this weekend

arts.ttl: Man City's Champions League push shows fight, even if spark is missing
arts.sum: Even if it has not been Manchester City's best season, their last-minute win against Aston Villa can provide an extra boost to qualify for the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola revels in high-pressure win over Aston Villa and insists he 'has not forgotten' Man City player with 'huge personality'
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola hailed Manchester City's ability to embrace pressure after they took charge of the Champions League race. Matheus Nunes scored a dramatic 94th-minute winner.

arts.ttl: Passionate Guardiola continues to solve Man City puzzle
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola was emotional throughout Manchester City's win over Aston Villa, but may have found another piece of the puzzle.

arts.ttl: ‘So important’: Pep Guardiola delighted after last-gasp strike stuns Aston Villa
arts.athr: Jamie Jackson at the Etihad Stadium
arts.sum: City manager turns focus to FA Cup after vital victory Guardiola praises stand-in full-backs Nunes and O’Reilly Pep Guardiola said he was “really happy” after Matheus Nunes’s winner in added time gave Manchester City a crucial win against Aston Villa in the race for Champions League qualification. Victory lifts the champions to third place on 61 points, four ahead of Chelsea in sixth, with four games left. A top-five finish will secure European Cup football. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Ederson future: Man City goalkeeper 'exploring' exit as Brazilian earmarks 'preferred destination'
arts.sum: Manchester City goalkeeper Ederson is reportedly exploring possible exit routes as he identifies his preferred destination for a summer move.

arts.ttl: So important – Pep Guardiola delighted by late winner against Aston Villa
arts.sum: Matheus Nunes’ stoppage-time goal kept Manchester City’s Champions League hopes in their own hands.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes shock admission about Man City's season after they boosted Champions League hopes with dramatic winner against Aston Villa
arts.sum: The Premier League champions - for a few more days at least - moved into third place, four points clear of sixth-place Villa, thanks to Matheus Nunes' 94th-minute strike.

arts.ttl: Why did Marmoush not get an assist in FPL?
arts.sum: The Egyptian played a key role in Bernardo's goal on Tuesday The post Why did Marmoush not get an assist in FPL? appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.
